description: 单词消消乐 - DOM+Tailwind 卡通明亮风格

assertions.description: 主循环可玩：点击开始 → 进入 playing 状态

setup.js: document.querySelectorAll('button').forEach(b => { if (b.innerText.includes('开始') || b.innerText.includes('Start') || b.innerText.includes('游戏')) b.click(); });

assertions.description: 配对规则正确：匹配成功加分

setup.js: const cards = window.gameState.cards; if (cards && cards.length >= 2) { const firstPairId = cards[0].pairId; const pair1 = cards.find(c => c.pairId === firstPairId && c.lang === 'en' && !c.matched); const pair2 = cards.find(c => c.pairId === firstPairId && c.lang === 'cn' && !c.matched); if (pair1 && pair2) { window.gameState.selectedCards = [pair1, pair2]; const oldScore = window.gameState.score; window.checkMatch(); window.gameState._matchTestPassed = window.gameState.score > oldScore; } }

assertions.description: 胜利条件：完成所有配对进入胜利状态

setup.js: window.clearInterval(window.gameState.timerInterval); if (window.gameState.cards) { window.gameState.cards.forEach(c => c.matched = true); window.gameState.matchedPairs = window.gameState.totalPairs; } setTimeout(() => { if (window.gameState.matchedPairs >= window.gameState.totalPairs) { window.gameState.phase = 'win'; } }, 100);

assertions.description: 失败条件：时间耗尽进入失败状态
关卡递进：验证关卡数据结构和 level 字段
连击系统：验证 combo 字段存在
boot 后 phase 为 ready（独立测试，重置状态）
playing 状态有 timeLeft、score、level 字段

setup.js: document.querySelectorAll('button').forEach(b => { if (b.innerText.includes('开始') || b.innerText.includes('Start') || b.innerText.includes('游戏')) b.click(); });

expect.selector: typeof window.gameState.timeLeft === 'number' && typeof window.gameState.score === 'number' && typeof window.gameState.level === 'number'

assertions.description: play 场景渲染出卡片元素

setup.js: window.gameState.phase = 'win'; if (typeof render === 'function') render(); else window.gameState._renderExists = false;

assertions.description: MVP 边界：代码里不得出现登录/排行榜/班级管理相关关键字
